selection_bias_assessment.regime_dependency: 8-12c asks only appear during strong DOWN trending regimes. Zero 8-12c during range-bound BTC.
selection_bias_assessment.edge_assessment: Genuine edge during trending regimes. The 8-12c ask IS the signal.

pnl_inflation_from_dedup.description: Lowest-ask dedup inflates PnL by ~24% vs first-observation strategy
pnl_inflation_from_dedup.note: In live trading, entry timing is random within window. Conservative estimate uses first-observation strategy.

spread_gate_rationale.rationale: 8-12 cent contracts have 8-13% spreads. Zero candidates pass spread <= 0.02. The 0.20 gate passes all 287 trades.

condition_id_gap.description: condition_id and down_token_id not stored in scanner forensics data
condition_id_gap.resolution: Marked as UNVERIFIED in live_equivalence audit. Not a blocking issue for paper validation.

regime_dependency.description: All 287 trades occurred during BTC DOWN trending (June 7-14)
regime_dependency.note: The cell is regime-locked. It only trades during DOWN trending. No edge during range-bound.

look_ahead_bias.note: Early entry has HIGHEST WR, which is opposite to look-ahead bias.
